events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the wrong overload class setting is a NEC 430.32 sizing violation caught before energization — a sequence gate (verifying protective settings against motor nameplate data) was skipped. Decision is `fail`, risk `high`, with corrective steps (verify nameplate FLA/class, reset per mfr manual, no-load then load trip test, quality gate sign-off) required before the circuit can be energized for production.
